block.header: taka ma no para ni kamu dumari masi te koto pazime tamapi si kamu rwoki kamu rwomi no mikoto moti te ame no take ti ni ya po yorodu no kamwi tati wo kamu tudwope tama pi kamu pakari pakari tamapi te wa ga sumyemima no mikoto pa toyo asi para no midu po no kuni wo yasu kuni to tapira kyeku sirosi myese to ame no ipa kura panare te ame no ya pye gumwo wo itu no ti wa ki ni ti waki te ama kudasi yosa si maturi si toki ni idure no kamwi wo madu tukapa sa ba midu po no kuni no araburu kamwi domo wo kamu parapi parapi mu ke mu to kamu pakari pakari tamapu toki ni moromoro no kamwi tati mina pakari mawosa ku amenopopi no mikoto wo tukapa si te tapira kye mu to mawosi ki

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-DAT,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,7@尊波豐葦原乃水穗之國乎安國止平久,*
IP-MAT,PP-DAT,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP-PRD,11@千別支爾千別弖天降所寄奉之,*

sentence.transcription: taka ma no para ni kamu dumari masi te
koto pazime tamapi si

sentence.kanji: 神漏岐神漏美乃命以弖
sentence.transcription: kamu rwoki kamu rwomi no mikoto moti te
ame no take ti ni ya po yorodu no
kamwi tati wo kamu tudwope tama pi
kamu pakari pakari tamapi te
wa ga sumyemima no

sentence.kanji: 尊波豐葦原乃水穗之國乎安國止平久
sentence.transcription: mikoto pa toyo asi para no midu po no kuni wo yasu kuni to tapira kyeku
sirosi myese to
ame no ipa kura panare te
ame no ya pye gumwo wo itu no

sentence.kanji: 千別支爾千別弖天降所寄奉之
sentence.transcription: ti wa ki ni ti waki te ama kudasi yosa si maturi si
toki ni idure no
kamwi wo madu tukapa sa ba
midu po no kuni no araburu
kamwi domo wo kamu parapi
parapi mu ke mu to kamu pakari pakari tamapu
toki ni moromoro no
kamwi tati mina pakari mawosa ku
amenopopi no
mikoto wo tukapa si te
tapira kye mu to mawosi ki

block.header: koko wo motite ama kudasi tukapa su toki ni ko no kamwi pa kapyeri goto mawosa zari ki

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-DAT,NP,2@時爾此神波返言不申支,*

sentence.transcription: koko wo motite
ama kudasi tukapa su

sentence.kanji: 時爾此神波返言不申支
sentence.transcription: toki ni ko no kamwi pa kapyeri goto mawosa zari ki

block.header: tugi ni tukapa si si takemikuma no mikoto mo titi no koto ni sitagapi te kapyeri goto mawosa zu

sentence.transcription: tugi ni tukapa si si
takemikuma no
mikoto mo titi no koto ni sitagapi te
kapyeri goto mawosa zu

block.header: mata tukapa si si amewakapikwo mo kapyeri goto mawosa zu te taka tu tori no wazapapi ni yori te tati dokoro ni mwi use ni ki

sentence.transcription: mata tukapa si si
amewakapikwo mo kapyeri goto mawosa zu te
taka tu
tori no wazapapi ni yori te
tati dokoro ni mwi use ni ki

block.header: koko wo motite ama tu kamwi no mi koto moti te mata pakari tamapi te putunusi no mikoto takemikaduti no mikoto puta pasira no kamwi tati wo ama kudasi tama pite araburu kamwi tati wo kamu parapi parapi tama pi kamu yapasi yapasi tamapi te koto twopi si ipa ne ko no tati kusa no kaki pa mo koto yamete sumyemima no mikoto wo ama kudasi yosa si maturi ki

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,11@磐根樹立草之片葉毛語止弖,*

sentence.transcription: koko wo motite
ama tu kamwi no mi koto moti te
mata pakari tamapi te
putunusi no
mikoto takemikaduti no
mikoto puta pasira no
kamwi tati wo ama kudasi tama pite
araburu
kamwi tati wo kamu parapi parapi tama pi
kamu yapasi yapasi tamapi te
koto twopi si

sentence.kanji: 磐根樹立草之片葉毛語止弖
sentence.transcription: ipa ne ko no tati kusa no kaki pa mo koto yamete
sumyemima no
mikoto wo ama kudasi yosa si maturi ki

block.header: ka ku ama kudasi yosa si maturi si yo mo no kunuti to opo yamato pi taka mi no kuni wo yasu kuni to sadame maturi te simwo tu ipa ne ni miya basira putwo siki tate takama no para ni ti gwi taka siri te ame no mi kage pi no mi kage to tukape maturi te yasu kuni to tapirake ku sirosi myesa mu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,2@大倭日高見之國乎安國止定奉弖,*
IP-MAT,3@下津磐根爾宮柱大敷立,*
IP-MAT,4@高天之原爾千木高知弖,*
IP-MAT,5@天之御蔭日之御蔭止仕奉弖,*

sentence.transcription: ka ku ama kudasi yosa si maturi si
yo mo no kunuti to

sentence.kanji: 大倭日高見之國乎安國止定奉弖
sentence.transcription: opo yamato pi taka mi no kuni wo yasu kuni to sadame maturi te

sentence.kanji: 下津磐根爾宮柱大敷立
sentence.transcription: simwo tu ipa ne ni miya basira putwo siki tate

sentence.kanji: 高天之原爾千木高知弖
sentence.transcription: takama no para ni ti gwi taka siri te

sentence.kanji: 天之御蔭日之御蔭止仕奉弖
sentence.transcription: ame no mi kage pi no mi kage to tukape maturi te
yasu kuni to tapirake ku sirosi myesa mu

block.header: sumyemima no mikoto no ame no mi araka no uti ni ma su sumye gamwi tati pa ara bwi tama pi takye bwi tamapu koto na ku site takama no para ni pazime si koto wo kamu nagara mo sirosi myesi te kamunapobi oponapobi ni napo si tama pite ko no tokoro ywori pa yo mo wo mi parukasu yama gapa no kiywo ki tokoro ni uturi ide masi te wa ga tokoro to usupaki ma se to tate maturu mi tegura pa akaru tape teru tape nigi tape ara tape ni sonape maturi te mi akaramuru mono to kagami mote aswobu mono to tama i panatu mono to yumi ya uti tatu mono to tati pase iduru mono to mi ma mi ki pa mika no pe taka siri mika no para mite narabe te yone ni mo kapi ni mo yama ni sumu mono pa ke no nikwo mono ke no ara mono opo nwo no para ni opuru mono pa ama na kara na awo mi no para ni sumu mono pa pata no piro mono pata no se mono oki tu mopa pye tu mopa ni itaru made ni yoko yama no goto ku tukuwe tu mono ni oki tarapasi te tate matu ru udu no mitegura wo sumye gamwi tati no mi kokoro mo akiraka ni yasu mitegura no tari mitegura to tapirake ku kikosi myesi te tatari tama pi takye bwi tamapu koto na ku site yama kapa no piro ku kiywo ki tokoro ni uturi ide masi te kamu nagara sidumari ma se to tatape goto wope maturaku to mawosu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ARG,PP-TOP,NP,2@皇神等波荒備給比健備給,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,6@神直日大直日爾直之給比弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,35@物者鰭廣物鰭狹物奧津海菜邊津海菜爾至万弖爾橫山之如久,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,39@幣帛乎皇神等乃御心毛明爾,*

sentence.transcription: sumyemima no

sentence.kanji: 尊乃天御舍之内爾坐須
sentence.transcription: mikoto no ame no mi araka no uti ni ma su

sentence.kanji: 皇神等波荒備給比健備給
sentence.transcription: sumye gamwi tati pa ara bwi tama pi takye bwi tamapu
koto na ku site
takama no para ni pazime si

sentence.kanji: 事乎神奈我良毛所知食
sentence.transcription: koto wo kamu nagara mo sirosi myesi te

sentence.kanji: 神直日大直日爾直之給比弖
sentence.transcription: kamunapobi oponapobi ni napo si tama pite
ko no tokoro ywori pa yo mo wo mi parukasu
yama gapa no kiywo ki
tokoro ni uturi ide masi te
wa ga tokoro to
usupaki ma se to
tate maturu
mi tegura pa akaru
tape teru
tape nigi tape ara tape ni sonape maturi te
mi akaramuru
mono to
kagami mote aswobu
mono to
tama i panatu
mono to
yumi ya uti tatu
mono to
tati pase iduru
mono to
mi ma mi ki pa mika no pe taka siri
mika no para mite narabe te
yone ni mo
kapi ni mo
yama ni sumu

sentence.kanji: 物者毛乃和物毛乃荒物
sentence.transcription: mono pa ke no nikwo mono ke no ara mono
opo nwo no para ni opuru
mono pa ama na kara na
awo mi no para ni sumu

sentence.kanji: 物者鰭廣物鰭狹物奧津海菜邊津海菜爾至万弖爾橫山之如久
sentence.transcription: mono pa pata no piro mono pata no se mono oki tu mopa pye tu mopa ni itaru made ni yoko yama no goto ku
tukuwe tu mono ni oki tarapasi te
tate matu ru
udu no

sentence.kanji: 幣帛乎皇神等乃御心毛明爾
sentence.transcription: mitegura wo sumye gamwi tati no mi kokoro mo akiraka ni
yasu mitegura no
tari mitegura to tapirake ku kikosi myesi te
tatari tama pi takye bwi tamapu
koto na ku site
yama kapa no piro ku kiywo ki
tokoro ni uturi ide masi te
kamu nagara sidumari ma se to
tatape goto wope maturaku to mawosu
